ONE CARD, TWO SUBMISSION NAMES (round-10 correction, live swile shape): this single card holds BOTH consent checkboxes and they post under DIFFERENT names -- the OPTIONAL marketing opt-in and the REQUIRED privacy consent -- each in its own
